Tests and build script for the health service in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[test_health.c](test_health.c.md)**: Tests for the health service in the Pebble firmware, including metric calculations, session handling, and event alerts.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing health service components in the pebble-firmware project.
